meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap using Claude Code and Antigravity. An advanced, step-by-step guide to shipping high-end SaaS projects in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for clients to hand you work. Use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold complex, production-ready SaaS applications in hours, not weeks. By integrating Antigravity for architectural planning, you generate high-fidelity portfolio pieces that demonstrate technical mastery, speed, and clean code, effectively eliminating the 'no portfolio' barrier for high-ticket clients.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the skills, but without a portfolio, you're invisible to high-paying clients. The cycle is brutal: you need a job to get a portfolio, but you need a portfolio to get a job. It’s a bottleneck that keeps talented engineers trapped in low-tier gig work, grinding for pennies while others command premium rates.

Today, we break that cycle. By leveraging Claude Code’s autonomous engineering capabilities alongside Antigravity’s architectural precision, you can build a flagship SaaS product over the weekend. This isn't just about writing code; it's about deploying a professional-grade asset that proves your worth to any enterprise client. It’s time to stop explaining what you can do and start showing it.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to structure a high-demand SaaS project (like a Stripe-integrated dashboard) to ensure the tech stack is industry-standard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Architect a scalable SaaS dashboard for a B2B service. Include Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, Supabase for auth, and Stripe for billing. Outline the project structure and primary API routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Initialize a new Next.js project based on the Antigravity architecture provided.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Core Auth Layer
steps.description: Authentication is the foundation of trust. Use Claude Code to implement secure Supabase auth templates that demonstrate your focus on security.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication flow using Supabase. Include sign-up, login, and protected route middleware for Next.js.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Implement the Supabase auth middleware and protected routes based on the provided architectural requirements.'

steps.title: Integrate Professional Billing
steps.description: High-ticket clients care about revenue. Build a clean Stripe integration to show you can handle real-world financial transactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler and subscription logic for a SaaS tiered pricing model. Ensure clean error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Add Stripe subscription logic and webhook handlers to the current project structure.'

steps.title: Develop Data-Driven UI Components
steps.description: Create reusable, high-performance UI components that demonstrate your ability to manage state and complex data visualization.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive data table component using Shadcn UI that fetches and displays real-time data from the Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Generate a Shadcn UI data table component and integrate the Supabase data fetching hook.'

steps.title: Deploy and Portfolio Polish
steps.description: Finalize the production build and document your process. A portfolio is only as good as its visibility and documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md for this SaaS project, highlighting the architecture, security features, and tech stack choices for prospective clients.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --prompt 'Review the codebase for production optimization and generate a high-impact README.md.'

pro_tips: Always commit your changes with descriptive, conventional-style messages to show you know how to manage a professional Git history.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your critical business logic; clients will hire you on the spot if they see 80%+ test coverage.
Structure your README with a 'Decision Log' explaining why you chose specific libraries; it shows senior-level architectural thinking.
Host your project on Vercel with a custom domain; nothing screams 'amateur' louder than a default .vercel.app URL.
Record a 60-second Loom walkthrough of your code structure to include in your portfolio site; it proves you actually wrote it.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, link the repository to your personal portfolio site, and start pitching your services to clients using the live demo as your primary case study.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the tools to out-ship 90% of the freelance market. Stop waiting for the perfect opportunity and start creating your own by showcasing real, production-ready code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
